comment: Vercel configuration for the AI Resume Builder frontend

rewrites.comment: Serve api-config.js from a special build-time file.
rewrites.comment2: This file sets window.__API_BASE__ to your Render backend URL.
rewrites.comment3: Vercel generates this file using the VITE_API_URL environment variable.

rewrites.comment: All other routes serve index.html (single page app behaviour).
